_schema.comment: Source of truth for /blog/ aggregator. Each entry surfaces in /blog/ AND lives at its canonical postUrl. Article-tagging discipline: only entries explicitly added here appear in the blog. See ml* entry on Article-tagging discipline.

fields.title: the article title
fields.sectionId: the parent section slug (e.g. nutrition, marginalia)
fields.sectionUrl: URL to the parent section index
fields.postUrl: canonical URL to the article itself
fields.excerpt: one or two sentences for the listing

posts.title: Example review
posts.excerpt: A stub. Replace this file with a lecture review. Or delete it.
